name: Hummus- Quick and Easy Diabetic Menus
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the chickpeas and reserve 1/4 to 1/2 cup of the liquid.
2. Combine all ingredients except parsley in a blender.
3. Puree until smooth, adding chickpea liquid as needed to thin the puree.
4. Refrigerate for 3-6 hours before serving to blend the flavors.
5. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
6. Serve with vegetables, pita bread or as a sandwich spread.
